name: WLF_ADVISOR_TRANSLATIONS
description: Table to hold translations data for various objects

columns.Name: ADVISOR_TRANSLATION_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: ADVISOR_TRANSLATION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier for easy reference.

columns.Name: SKILLS_ADVISOR_PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: Bulk advisor request identifier.

columns.Name: OBJECT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of an object undergoing translation.

columns.Name: OBJECT_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of an object undergoing translation.

columns.Name: SOURCE_LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language in which the object was originally created.

columns.Name: TARGET_LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language to which object should be translated to.

columns.Name: ORIGINAL_TEXT1
columns.Comments: Original text1 of the object.

columns.Name: PROVIDER_TEXT1
columns.Comments: Translation text1 provided by the provider.

columns.Name: SELECTED_TEXT1
columns.Comments: Translation text1 that was selected by the user, post edits if any.

columns.Name: ORIGINAL_TEXT2
columns.Comments: Original text2 of the object

columns.Name: PROVIDER_TEXT2
columns.Comments: Translation text2 provided by the provider.

columns.Name: SELECTED_TEXT2
columns.Comments: Translation text2 that was selected by the user, post edits if any.

columns.Name: ORIGINAL_TEXT3
columns.Comments: Original text3 of the object.

columns.Name: PROVIDER_TEXT3
columns.Comments: Translation text3 provided by the provider.

columns.Name: SELECTED_TEXT3
columns.Comments: Translation text3 that was selected by the user, post edits if any.

columns.Name: ORIGINAL_HTML_TEXT1
columns.Comments: Original HTML text1 of the object.

columns.Name: PROVIDER_HTML_TEXT1
columns.Comments: Translation HTML text1 provided by the provider.

columns.Name: SELECTED_HTML_TEXT1
columns.Comments: Translation HTML text1 that was selected by the user, post edits if any.

columns.Name: ORIGINAL_HTML_TEXT2
columns.Comments: Original HTML text2 of the object.

columns.Name: PROVIDER_HTML_TEXT2
columns.Comments: Translation HTML text2 provided by the provider.

columns.Name: SELECTED_HTML_TEXT2
columns.Comments: Translation HTML text2 that was selected by the user, post edits if any.

columns.Name: PROCESSING_JOB_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the ESS job that processed the translation.

columns.Name: CURATED_FLAG
columns.Comments: Curated flag to capture users acceptance.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
